misc.text: ‼️ RÉCORD DEL MUNDO ‼️ Unai Simón 🇪🇸 alcanza los 518 minutos sin encajar y firma la MAYOR racha de imbatibilidad de un portero en TODA la historia de la Copa del Mundo. misc.title: Wisst ihr, wer der eigentliche "Villain" in dieser Geschichte ist? Nicht Merz und seine lächerliche CDU (eine Partei, der ich nicht einmal die Zehn-Prozent-Hürde wünschen würde), nein, es ist die SPD,
misc.text: Wisst ihr, wer der eigentliche "Villain" in dieser Geschichte ist? Nicht Merz und seine lächerliche CDU (eine Partei, der ich nicht einmal die Zehn-Prozent-Hürde wünschen würde), nein, es ist die SPD, die sich so leicht verkauft und einen Scheiß auf ihre Wähler gibt. Sie sind die eigentlichen Gegner, weil sie bei so einem Unsinn tatsächlich mitmachen. Es ist Wahnsinn, so weit entfernt von dem, wofür die Partei einst stand, aber so läuft das eben: Parteien stellen jahrelang Lobbyinteressen in den Vordergrund, und wir normalen Bürger müssen die Konsequenzen tragen. Ich hoffe wirklich, dass beide bei der nächsten Wahl kläglich scheitern. @spdde @CDU Clash Report (@clashreport) Germany's Chancellor Merz: We can no longer accept the extraordinarily high levels of sick leave in our companies. We are abolishing sick leave by telephone and introducing the requirement to submit a medical certificate from the very first day of illness. We know this is a tough decision. But we can no longer afford this competitive disadvantage caused by prolonged absences from work. Video — https://nitter.net/clashreport/status/2072603035277139974#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1187 .... WANJIIIIIIIIIIII!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! 😭😭😭😭😭😭 The Will of Marco (マルコの意志) (@TheWillOfMarco) #ONEPIECE1187 SANJI'S SCENES IN THE CHAPTER: Sanji arrives at the
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1187 .... WANJIIIIIIIIIIII!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! 😭😭😭😭😭😭 The Will of Marco (マルコの意志) (@TheWillOfMarco) #ONEPIECE1187 SANJI'S SCENES IN THE CHAPTER: Sanji arrives at the Western Village, where Killingham is kidnapping the children with MMA Zaza. He begins assessing the situation in a monologue. Narrator: In the "Western Village," rain poured down as if the heavens themselves had been torn open... SANJI'S MONOLOGUE: Situation Assessment... Current Situation #1: A giant monster, even bigger than the giants themselves... is abducting the children and is on the process of moving them elsewhere. Response: ...However, I'm not going to rescue the brats. Current Situation #2: I can't bear to watch the mothers crying in despair...!! Response: ...However, that monster is also a woman. I can't bring myself to kick her... Supplement Note: The giant warriors will never give up on rescuing the children. Current Situation #3: ...I don't want to see a woman cry. But I won't be taking part in that battle. That's because... *Sanji attacks Killingham* You are the "Ringleader"* of everything!!! (*the chapter title reference) Even if the giants loses sight of you... You can't escape from me!! Killingham: Goodness... you're a tough one!! Sanji: I'm putting an end to all of this!! Killingham: Fool!! There's a world of difference between being "tough" and being "immortal"!!! Although It's true that if you eliminate me, my ability will be dispelled as well!! Give it a go! Do you really think you can eliminate the "Rain God"?! Go forth, "Rain God"!! Take the brats with you! Sanji: I know about your* "weakness" (Sanji is referring to all of them - "omaera", not just Killingham) Killingham: Hahaha!! Now that's an interesting thing to say!! Well... do you have "Color of Conqueror's Haki" then?! Go ahead and try to kill me!!! Killingham attacks Sanji with his trident, sending him crashing into one of the giant houses. He then recalls what Gaban told him after asking whether he has Conqueror's Haki. *Memory Flashback* Gaban to Zoro: You... is that all you've got to support your "Yonko" captain?! Zoro: Urgh... Sorry... Sanji: Hey, old man, what about me?! Do I have Conqueror's Haki?! Gaban: You should have the potential... Sanji: Really?! Gaban: However, for some reason, you... harbor a dangerous self-deprecation. You must become a "King" yourself too... if you truly want to make Luffy the "King of the Pirates"!! — https://nitter.net/TheWillOfMarco/status/2072666404453835196#m

items.text: Wisst ihr, wer der eigentliche "Villain" in dieser Geschichte ist? Nicht Merz und seine lächerliche CDU (eine Partei, der ich nicht einmal die Zehn-Prozent-Hürde wünschen würde), nein, es ist die SPD, die sich so leicht verkauft und einen Scheiß auf ihre Wähler gibt. Sie sind die eigentlichen Gegner, weil sie bei so einem Unsinn tatsächlich mitmachen. Es ist Wahnsinn, so weit entfernt von dem, wofür die Partei einst stand, aber so läuft das eben: Parteien stellen jahrelang Lobbyinteressen in den Vordergrund, und wir normalen Bürger müssen die Konsequenzen tragen. Ich hoffe wirklich, dass beide bei der nächsten Wahl kläglich scheitern. @spdde @CDU Clash Report (@clashreport) Germany's Chancellor Merz: We can no longer accept the extraordinarily high levels of sick leave in our companies. We are abolishing sick leave by telephone and introducing the requirement to submit a medical certificate from the very first day of illness. We know this is a tough decision. But we can no longer afford this competitive disadvantage caused by prolonged absences from work. Video — https://nitter.net/clashreport/status/2072603035277139974#m
